polls.name: What should we do this weekend?
polls.desc: Vote for what you'd like to do! Everyone gets one vote.

votes.comment: Only if we order pizza too

polls.name: What's been our best coping strategy lately?
polls.desc: Thinking about what helps us the most

options.name: Talking to each other in the app

votes.vote: Talking to each other in the app
Talking to each other in the app

polls.name: Movie night genre vote
polls.desc: What kind of movie for Friday?

polls.name: Should we tell Alex about the system?
polls.desc: Alex has been a close friend for years. Sam thinks we should tell them. This is a big decision.

votes.comment: Alex would understand. They're our best friend.
I think it's time. Hiding is exhausting.
Too risky. What if they don't understand?
Practically, it would make social situations easier
The system is ready for this step

queuedEvents.message: Hey! Remember to log who's fronting right now.
Whoever is fronting, please take the morning meds!
Time to wind down. How did today go? Leave a note!

notes.title: Work reflection
notes.note: Had a good day at work today. Managed to set a boundary with the boss about overtime. Small steps.

notes.title: Therapy thoughts
notes.note: Therapist suggested I try to let go of control more. Hard to hear but probably right.

notes.title: Good day
notes.note: Today felt really good. The system feels more connected than ever. Talked to Nova for the first time in a while.

notes.title: Recipe ideas
notes.note: Want to try making homemade bread this weekend. Found a good sourdough recipe.

notes.title: Garden plans
notes.note: Planning the spring garden: tomatoes, herbs, sunflowers. Lily wants to help plant.

notes.title: Gym progress
notes.note: Hit a new personal record on bench press today. Feeling strong.

notes.title: Processing
notes.note: The trigger on Feb 24 hit hard. I need to talk to the therapist about better response strategies.

notes.title: Therapy progress
notes.note: Today's session was a breakthrough. Started EMDR for the first time. Intense but felt like something shifted.

notes.title: Poem draft
notes.note: Wrote a poem today about water and healing. Might share it with the system later.

notes.title: Feeling hopeful
notes.note: Three months into therapy and I can feel the difference. The heavy days still come but they pass faster now.

notes.title: Art thoughts
notes.note: Started experimenting with abstract expressionism. It feels more honest than the realistic stuff.

notes.title: System stuff
notes.note: I don't know why I was so angry for so long. I think I was carrying something that wasn't mine.

notes.title: The big painting
notes.note: Finished the abstract piece about the system. Nine colors swirling together. Best thing I've ever made.

notes.title: Budget update
notes.note: January budget: slightly over on food, under on entertainment. Net positive.

notes.title: System organization
notes.note: Set up the Simply Plural reminders. Everyone needs to be better about logging fronts.

notes.title: Social circle
notes.note: Alex is becoming a really close friend. Starting to think about telling them about the system.

notes.title: Concert!!
notes.note: Best concert ever!! The energy was incredible. Need to do this more often.

notes.title: Fun day!
notes.note: Luna and me made cookies today and they were SO GOOD!! Extra sprinkles on mine!

notes.title: System observation
notes.note: The system is stabilizing. Switches more intentional. Communication through the app has improved significantly.

members.name: Kai
members.desc: Host of the system. Kai has been the primary fronter since the body was around 16. He handles most day-to-day responsibilities including work and social interactions with people who don't know about the system. Tends to be calm and analytical, sometimes too focused on keeping things "normal." Enjoys reading, coffee, and hiking.

members.name: Luna
members.desc: Caretaker of the system. Luna emerged when the body was around 12 and has always been nurturing and warm. She takes care of the younger alters and often co-fronts with Kai during emotionally difficult situations. She loves cooking, gardening, and warm blankets. Often fronts in the evenings when the system needs to wind down.

members.name: Ash
members.desc: Gatekeeper. Ash controls switching and access to the inner world. They present as ageless and somewhat detached, but deeply care about system safety. Rarely fronts unless there's a crisis or important decision about system boundaries. Speaks in a calm, measured way. Interested in meditation and philosophy.

members.name: Marcus
members.desc: Protector. Marcus is the system's main protector, emerging around age 8 during a particularly difficult period. He presents as older and stronger, around 35. He fronts during confrontational situations, medical appointments, and when the system feels threatened. Can come across as intimidating but is fiercely loyal to the system. Likes working out, action movies, and woodworking.

members.name: Lily
members.desc: Little. Lily is around 7 years old and holds a lot of the system's childhood joy and wonder. She loves stuffed animals, cartoons, coloring, and sweet snacks. She sometimes fronts unexpectedly when the system encounters something nostalgic or playful. Luna is her primary caretaker inside. She can get scared easily and Marcus helps her feel safe.

members.name: River
members.desc: Emotional holder. River carries and processes a lot of the system's heavy emotions - grief, sadness, longing. They are around 20 and tend to be quiet and introspective. River often fronts during therapy sessions or when the system needs to process something emotional. They express themselves through poetry and music. Has been working hard in therapy on healthy coping.

members.name: James
members.desc: Daily life manager and organizer. James is around 30 and extremely practical. He handles bills, scheduling, groceries, and keeping the household running. He often co-fronts with Kai during work hours. Very detail-oriented and sometimes rigid about routines. He's the one who usually updates this app and keeps track of fronting. Enjoys spreadsheets, planning, and true crime podcasts.

members.name: Nova
members.desc: Creative alter, former persecutor now in recovery. Nova is around 19 and used to be very hostile toward the rest of the system, but has been working through things in therapy. Now channels her intensity into art - painting, digital art, and writing. Still has a sharp tongue and can be blunt, but is learning to communicate better. Has a complicated relationship with the system but is making progress.

members.name: Sam
members.desc: Social alter. Sam is around 25 and is the system's social butterfly. He handles parties, group hangouts, and casual social situations where Kai feels overwhelmed. Very charming, outgoing, and funny. Sometimes takes risks the rest of the system isn't comfortable with. Loves music, dancing, video games, and making people laugh. Gets along with everyone in the system except occasionally butts heads with James about responsibility.

chatMessages.message: Hey everyone, just checking in. How's everyone doing today?
Test message from API
Anyone want to watch a movie tonight?
Test approach 2
Made pasta tonight, it turned out really good! Left some in the fridge for whoever fronts next.
Thanks Luna! I'll grab some for lunch tomorrow.
Reminder: we have a dentist appointment next Tuesday at 10am.
Got it, thanks James.
can someone get more apple juice please??
I'll add it to the grocery list sweetie!
That meeting today was rough. Handled it but we need better work boundaries.
Agreed. Let's discuss at the next system meeting.
Friday night was awesome! Alex says hi to everyone.
I finished a new painting today. It's not perfect but I actually like it.
That's wonderful Nova! I'd love to see it!
...thanks. Maybe later.
Therapy was intense today. Tired but I think we made progress.
I'm proud of you River. Take it easy tonight.
Bills are all paid for the month. Budget's tight - let's be careful with spending.
Noted. I'll cut back on eating out.
I've noticed switching instability lately. Please be more intentional about logging fronts.
I can set up reminders for everyone.
Sorry about last night. Shouldn't have stayed out that late.
It's okay Sam. Just check in next time?
We need to be more careful.
Reorganized the kitchen! Everything's labeled now.
New month, fresh start. How's everyone feeling about our goals?
I've been tracking progress. We're doing well with therapy goals.
I think therapy is really helping. I feel more grounded.
I don't hate everyone as much anymore so I guess that's progress
Nova! That's actually really sweet coming from you.
Don't make it weird.
Today was really hard. That work conflict triggered me.
I noticed. Stepped in to help stabilize. Everyone okay?
Taking care of things tonight. Marcus, you did great. Rest now.
Luna and me made cookies today!! They have sprinkles!!
Save me some!
Dibs on the chocolate chip ones!
Valentine's Day is hard. Just putting that out there.
I know sweetheart. We'll take care of each other.
We don't need a partner to be whole. We have each other.
That's actually... really nice Kai.
Spring cleaning this weekend. I'm making a checklist.
Do we HAVE to?
Yes. Yes we do.
Spring is coming. Anyone else feeling more energetic?
The garden is going to be so nice this year!
I started a new painting project. It's the biggest one I've done.
That's exciting Nova! What's the subject?
It's abstract. About the system. About us.
That sounds beautiful.
Therapy update: therapist said I'm making really good progress.
That's amazing River! You've worked so hard.
Proud of you.
Today was a good day. Nova and I actually talked for a while.
Yeah. It was... okay. More than okay actually.
Anyone seen that new show on Netflix? It's so good
Which one?
The mystery one with the detective. Can't remember the name lol
Oh I think I know which one! It's really cozy.
I wanna watch cartoons instead!
We can watch cartoons tomorrow sweetie.
Just found this amazing artist online. Their use of color is incredible.
Share the link?
Maybe.
TRIVIA NIGHT TOMORROW who's excited???
You're the only one who goes to trivia night, Sam.
And I win every time! You're welcome!
i drew a picture of all of us today!! Luna helped
It's on the fridge! Well, virtually on the fridge.
That's cute kid.
Concert last night was INCREDIBLE. Best night in ages.
Your ears are still ringing from the seats you got.
Worth it!
I'm so frustrated. Why can't I just be normal? Why do we have to deal with all of this?
Nova, it's okay to feel frustrated. You're not alone in this.
I know. I just... some days are harder than others.
Today's trigger came out of nowhere. I was just at the grocery store and suddenly everything felt wrong.
I felt it too. I was ready to take over if needed.
Thanks Marcus. Knowing you're there helps.
I'm so tired of pretending to be one person at work. The masking is exhausting.
I know. But we're doing our best. That's enough.
We're all in this together Kai. You don't have to carry it all.
The trigger on Feb 24 really shook me. I thought I was past reacting that strongly.
Healing isn't linear. You responded, you protected. That's what you're here for.
Thanks Ash.
I've been thinking about why I used to be so angry at everyone. I think I was just scared.
That takes a lot of courage to say, Nova.
Yeah well don't get used to it.
System Meeting - January 10, 2026. Agenda: Work boundaries, fronting schedule, therapy goals.
First item: Marcus mentioned we need better work boundaries. Thoughts?
The boss keeps piling on extra work. We need to learn to say no.
I can help draft some boundary scripts for common situations.
Good idea James. Second item: fronting schedule. Kai, you've been fronting too much.
I know. I'm trying to let others front more. It's hard to let go.
Maybe we can be more intentional about evening transitions.
Agreed. Third: therapy goals. River, how's it going?
We're working on grounding techniques. It's helping.
Meeting adjourned. Next meeting in 2 weeks.
System Meeting - January 22. Agenda: Switching stability, Sam's social boundaries, Nova check-in.
I've been monitoring switches. There have been a few unplanned ones this week.
I noticed too. Especially around stressful moments.
About last Friday... I know I was supposed to come home earlier.
We were worried. Communication is key.
I'll text someone next time. Promise.
Nova, how are you doing?
Fine. Better. The art helps.
We're glad to hear that Nova.
Good meeting. Keep up the communication everyone.
System Meeting - February 18. Topics: Budget, emotional processing, spring plans.
Budget update: we're on track this month. Good job everyone cutting back.
The Feb 24 incident was rough but I think we handled it well as a system.
Agreed. We responded quickly and took care of each other.
Spring plans: I want to start a garden. Anyone else have goals?
I want to try selling some art online.
That's a great idea Nova. We can help with that.
Good meeting. See everyone in March.
System Meeting - March 18. Check-in, therapy progress, Nova's art project.
Overall feeling good about where we are as a system.
Therapist says we're making great progress. I feel it too.
I finished the big painting. The abstract one about us. I'm actually proud of it.
We're all so proud of you Nova!
Can I see the painting??
Yeah Lily. I'll show you.
Good quarter for us. Feeling stronger.
Agreed. Great progress all around. Keep it up.
Doing well! I just finished reorganizing the bookshelf. It looks so much better now.
Niiice. Can we go to that new arcade place downtown later? I heard they have retro pinball machines
Budget's a bit tight this week Sam. Maybe next weekend? I just paid the electric bill.
I started sketching a new piece. It's darker than usual but I think it's some of my best work.
Quick system check: everyone been logging fronts consistently? I noticed some gaps in the history this week.
Sorry about that Ash. I've been a bit spacey this week. Therapy brought up some heavy stuff on Tuesday.
River, take the time you need. We've all got your back. Maybe we can do something low-key tonight?
Movie night? I vote for something lighthearted. No horror Sam, before you even suggest it.
Aww come on! Fine, comedy it is. But I get to pick the snacks.
That sounds good. I'll make sure to set the switch timer so we don't lose track.
can i pick the movie?? i want to watch something with animals in it!
I'll handle the grocery run. We need more eggs and that oat milk Kai likes.
Whatever. I'll be in the headspace working on art if anyone needs me. Don't need me though.
Thanks everyone. A quiet night in sounds perfect actually. And Marcus, can you grab some chamomile tea too?
I added chamomile tea and oat milk to the shared grocery list. Also reminder: we have the doctor's appointment Thursday at 2pm.
Thanks James. Who wants to front for the appointment? I did the last one.
I can handle it. I've been keeping notes on what we need to discuss with the doctor.
Found a really cool abandoned building to photograph. The light through the broken windows was perfect.
Anyone want to try that new ramen place on 5th street? I heard they have a spicy challenge bowl
Just finished a 10k run. New personal best! The weather was perfect for it.
Nice work Kai! I've been meaning to get back into running. Maybe we could go together sometime?
Work has been really stressful lately. My manager keeps piling on tasks and I don't know how to say no without it affecting us all.
Marcus, we should practice those boundary scripts from therapy. You don't have to take on everything.
I feel like I keep bringing the mood down in here. Does anyone else feel like they're always the one who needs support?
River, that's literally what this channel is for. We all need support. That's not a burden, it's being part of a system.
Agenda for next meeting: 1) fronting schedule review, 2) therapy goals update, 3) system rules check-in. Anyone want to add anything?
Can we add budget review to the agenda? I want to go over our savings plan for next month.
Good idea James. I also want to discuss our sleep schedule - it's been inconsistent and it's affecting all of us.
I wrote a poem last night. It's about seasons changing and finding peace in transitions.
That's beautiful River! I'd love to read it. Also, who left dishes in the sink again?
...that was probably me. My bad. I'll clean them up tonight I promise!
Has anyone seen my headphones? I left them on the desk last night and now they're gone.
Check the nightstand drawer. I think I put them away yesterday when I was tidying up.
Found them, thanks! Good morning everyone. What's the plan for today?
I need to work on that project proposal today. Can everyone try to keep things calm until I'm done? Should be about 3 hours.
Anyone else feeling overwhelmed today?
Yeah, it's been a long week for me too.
Let's make sure we get enough rest this weekend
Morning everyone! Coffee's ready in the kitchen
Thanks Sam! Perfect timing. We have a lot on our schedule today.
Does anyone want to grab lunch together later?
I'd like that. Maybe that new place near work?
I've got a meeting at 1pm but I could do lunch before that
Let me know! Sounds like a good idea
12:00 good for everyone? I'll make a reservation
Sounds perfect! Thanks for organizing this
This is what we needed. Some quality time together outside the house
Can't wait! It's been too long since we all hung out
I'm making my special salad for dinner tonight
